name: Windows Scheduled Task Search
description: Sucht geplante Tasks anhand eines Namensfragments.

commands.cmd: powershell "Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object {$_.TaskName -match '{{.TaskName}}'} | Select-Object TaskName, State, TaskPath"
commands.powershell: Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object {$_.TaskName -match '{{.TaskName}}'} | Select-Object TaskName, State, TaskPath
